info.english_meaning: to give birth to procreate to become pregnant to possess power to possess supremacy
info.hindI_arTa: utpanna karanA pEdA karanA jananA garBa DAraRa karanA adButa sAmarTya honA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: prasavoByanujYAnam  ' omiti brahmA prasOti ' (tE. upa. 2.16) aByAnujYAM brahmA dadAtItyarTaH  ' zuYaH sunoti sunute prasavESvaryayorasOt  gatO tayoSca savati dviruktyA tasya so na zaH ' (Slo. 21) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'gOriva prasavatyarTAn rasamuttamaSAlinI (BA॰aSva॰21.22) prasavati=sUte=utpAdayati prasava iha utpAda ukto nAByanujYAnam
'tatremaM yajYaM yajamAnaM ca Dehyo praRayeti prasOti' (Apa॰SrO॰3.6.19.1) aByanujAnAtItyarTaH
'devAnAM parizUtamasIti darBAn parizOti' (Apa0 SrO0 1236) parizavaRaM savanAya parigraha iti DUrtasvAmI
